paragraphs.name: 风格描述
paragraphs.instruction: 一句话概括壁纸风格和氛围，营造画面感

paragraphs.name: 使用场景
paragraphs.instruction: 适合什么人群、什么心情、什么场景使用，描述搭配效果

paragraphs.name: 引导保存
paragraphs.instruction: 引导保存壁纸、关注获取更多，用温柔有感染力的语气

paragraphs.name: 话题标签
paragraphs.instruction: #壁纸 #手机壁纸 #锁屏 #壁纸分享 等

images.name: 壁纸图
images.background_prompt_template:
A stunning mobile wallpaper in {style} style, {color_scheme} color palette.

The design features:
- Clean, uncluttered composition perfect for a phone screen
- {style} aesthetic with {visual_elements}
- Smooth gradients and subtle textures
- Modern, elegant, and eye-catching

9:16 vertical ratio, 4K resolution, high quality, minimalist yet striking design.
No text, no words, no letters, pure visual art.

images.name: iPhone展示图
images.background_prompt_template:
A sleek iPhone 15 Pro floating in {bg_color} minimalist background.

CRITICAL - The phone screen MUST display:
1. The EXACT wallpaper matching this description: {visual_description}
2. iPhone lock screen UI with time showing '{lock_time}' at the top
3. Date showing '{lock_date}' below the time
4. The text must be elegant, thin sans-serif font, white color

Wallpaper details (must be faithfully rendered on screen):
- Style: {style}
- Color scheme: {color_scheme}
- Visual elements: {visual_elements}

iPhone details:
- Titanium frame with brushed metal texture
- Dynamic Island visible at the top
- Screen has subtle glass reflection
- Time and date overlaid on the wallpaper

Lighting & Composition:
- Soft studio lighting with gentle highlights
- Subtle shadow beneath the device
- Phone positioned using rule of thirds
- Clean, premium product photography aesthetic

9:16 vertical ratio, 8K resolution, C4D render, ultra-realistic.

style.inference_prompt: Based on the topic '{topic}', identify the wallpaper style. Choose ONE from: minimalist, nature, gradient, abstract, geometric, floral, anime, landscape, urban, texture. Return ONLY the style name, no explanation.

color_scheme.inference_prompt: Based on the style '{style}', suggest a color scheme. Choose ONE from: soft pastel, vibrant, monochrome, earth tones, cool blue, warm sunset, forest green, ocean blue. Return ONLY the color scheme name, no explanation.

visual_elements.inference_prompt: Based on the '{style}' style and '{color_scheme}' color scheme, describe 2-3 visual elements in simple English. Examples: 'gentle waves and soft clouds', 'geometric shapes and clean lines', 'delicate leaves and petals', 'smooth gradients and abstract forms'. Return ONLY the description, max 15 words.

visual_description.inference_prompt: Describe the wallpaper visual in 5-8 words for the iPhone mockup. Focus on the main visual element. Examples: 'soft flowing abstract shapes', 'delicate nature patterns', 'clean geometric design', 'gentle gradient waves'. Return ONLY the description.

bg_color.inference_prompt: Based on the '{color_scheme}' color scheme, suggest a single solid background color for the iPhone mockup. Choose ONE from: white, cream, light gray, soft pink, light blue, beige. Return ONLY the color name.
